title: afrolimon purpuratum
intro: Afrolimon purpuratum is a plant species belonging to the Rutaceae family, commonly known as the citrus family. It is native to tropical Africa and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. Afrolimon purpuratum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
